prestazioni: Supercharger upgrade to a Magnuson TVS2300 (LSA engine code) with a 2.9" pulley, ported throttle body, and custom heat exchanger from VMP Performance, pushing boost to 12 psi for ~650 whp on 93 octane with supporting fuel system upgrades (Dewitts radiator, ID1000 injectors, and Walbro 450 LPH pump).

Full bolt-on drivetrain reinforcement: RPM Transmissions Level 4 automatic transmission build with a Sonnax Smart Shell, upgraded 300M input shaft, and Precision Industries billet torque converter (3,800 RPM stall), paired with an aluminum driveshaft from The Driveshaft Shop.

Suspension overhaul with KW Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable), Hotchkis Sport sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear), and polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension, combined with Brembo GT 6-piston front/4-piston rear brake kit (380mm rotors) and stainless steel brake lines from Goodridge.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a DAMD (Design Auto Motive Development) STS-V-specific kit with carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, finished in a matte PPG Cadillac Racing Blue with satin black accents.

OEM+ interior refresh with Recaro Pole Position seats (retrimmed in Alcantara with red stitching), a custom roll cage from Autopower Industries (bolt-in 6-point, TIG-welded), and a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel with a quick-release hub.

Aggressive aero package including a custom carbon fiber hood with LSA-specific heat extractors from ACS Composites, a Vortex Generator delete plate, and a custom dual-exit exhaust system with 3.5" polished stainless tips from Stainless Works, paired with a resonator delete.
